rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL J. SKAAR et al VS. THOMAS CLEMENTS LACEY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Amend Complaint, Deny Motion For Summary Judgment, Set Aside Prior Judgment And Award Of Attorneys Fees And Costs In Accordance With Decision Of Court Of Appeal
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 6, 2018 line 1. PLAINTIFFS MICHAEL SKAAR and ROGER COLE's Motion To Amend Complaint, Deny Motion For Summary Judgment, Set Aside Prior Judgment And Award Of Attorneys Fees And Costs In Accordance With Decision Of Court Of Appeal continued to December 6, 2018. Parties are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of opposition and reply to department 501 no later than November 16, 2018 with cover letters reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL ET AL VS. ANNE KIHAGI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Vacate Lis Pendens
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 6, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANTs NOZARI 2, LLC, ZORIALL, LLC, ANNA KIHAGI, CHRISTINE MWANGI, JULIA MWANGI and XELAN PROP 1, LLC's Motion To Vacate Lis Pendens continued to November 9, 2018. CCP 170.6 challenge to the honorable Ronald Evans Quidachay on file. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: INAM SHAMI VS. SCOTT ENNIS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Reopen Discovery And To Compel Further Responses To Written Discovery; And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 6, 2018 line 7. DEFENDANT AZ DESIGN & ENGINEERING, INC.'s MOTION To Reopen Discovery And To Compel Further Responses To Written Discovery; And For Sanctions DENIED in part. Motion to Compel Further Responses it DENIED. Motion is untimely. Parties present an order for execution regarding the dates and sequence of expert and city witnesses depositions. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Sever October 15, 2018 Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 6, 2018 line 3. CROSS DEFENDANTS LESLIE WAN and BRIAN KELLER's MOTION To Sever October 15, 2018 Cross-Complaint OFF CALENDAR per request of the moving party. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ROSY PALOMARES ET AL VS. BAY COMMUNITY HOUSING L.P. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 6, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANT GUERRERO ESPINOZA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurrer. No opposition filed= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ROSY PALOMARES ET AL VS. BAY COMMUNITY HOUSING L.P. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 6, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANTs BAY COMMUNITY HOUSING L.P.and GUERRERO ESPINOZA's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT GRANTED with leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurrer. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MISSION CAPP LIMITED PARTNERSHIP VS. MARIA DEL LA LUZ BELLO ATANACIO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 6, 2018 line 5. DEFENDANT MARIA DEL LA LUZ ATANACIO MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT GRANTED. Trial is set for November 13, 2018; settlement conference is set for November 8, 2018. Defendant to remit to Plaintiff no later than 2:00 p.m. on November 6, 2018 $1,268.98 representing daily damages for 1 week and fees and costs incurred by Plaintiff due to Defendant's failure to appear for settlement and trial (albeit this failure to excusable it was not due to any fault of Plaintiff). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LARRY HIGGINS VS. CRYSTAL COOK ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 6, 2018 line 6. DEFENDANTs CRYSTAL COOK and MARTIN GOMEZ's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND GRANTED, subject to (1) Defendants filing and providing a courtesy copy of Proof of Service for Motion to Vacate; (2) opposition; (3) Defendants filing a response no later than November 6, 2018 by 2:00 p.m. Defendants and their counsel are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B in future. Failure to do so will result in motion being taken off calendar. = (501/REQ)
